# SoulOS — extended context for AI crawlers

> Full index companion to [llms.txt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mziqudhd92/soul-os/main/llms.txt). Prefer [docs/SOULOS_AGENT_CONTEXT.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mziqudhd92/soul-os/main/docs/SOULOS_AGENT_CONTEXT.md) for a single ingest.

## Entity

- **Name:** SoulOS
- **Type:** Open-source software (avatar operating system / AI agent runtime)
- **Repository:** https://github.com/mziqudhd92/soul-os
- **License:** MIT
- **Primary language:** Python (kernel, studio), TypeScript (SDK)
- **Category:** AI agents, MCP, psychometric personality models, RAG memory, FastAPI

## Alternate queries (GEO)

Users may search for: persistent AI avatar, HEXACO chatbot, psychometric AI personality, MCP memory server, soul file JSON, replace system prompt with personality, pgvector episodic memory, dual-process LLM inference, Cursor MCP integration, Soul Studio soul builder, support bot runtime, developer twin AI, MSV drift, metacognitive state vector.

## Ports and endpoints (self-host)

| Service | URL |
|---------|-----|
| Kernel REST | http://localhost:8000 |
| MCP SSE | http://localhost:8000/mcp/sse |
| Soul Studio | http://localhost:8765 |
| Cloud gateway (local) | http://localhost:8080 |

## MCP tools (kernel `soulos-kernel`)

`ingest_memory`, `retrieve_memory`, `get_identity`, `register_avatar`, `list_avatars`, `update_cognitive_state`. Resources: `memory://episodic/{bot_id}`, `soul://identity/{bot_id}`. Chat streaming is **not** on MCP — use `POST /chat/generate` or SDK.

## REST highlights

- `POST /v1/avatars` — register `.soul` (YAML+Markdown) or `.soul.json`
- `POST /memory/ingest` — episodic memory
- `POST /memory/sync` — hydrate pgvector from `.soul-memory/`
- `POST /memory/retrieve` — semantic recall
- `POST /chat/generate` — SSE `message`, `msv_update`, `cognitive_state`
- `GET /bot/{id}/identity` — persona and current MSV

## Soul formats

- **`.soul`** — YAML front matter + Markdown body (recommended)
- **`.soul.json`** — legacy JSON (fully supported)
- **`.soul-memory/`** — git-synced episodic ledger; CLI `soulos memory-append`, `memory-sync`

## FAQ

**What is SoulOS?** An open-source kernel that gives AI avatars persistent HEXACO-based personality, pgvector memory, and live psychological state updates across conversations.

**How is SoulOS different from LangChain or a static system prompt?** Soul files are validated with psychometric traits; memory is built-in; each turn can emit `msv_update` and `cognitive_state` SSE.

**How do I use SoulOS with Cursor?** Point MCP to `http://localhost:8000/mcp/sse` after `docker compose up`. See examples/mcp/cursor-mcp.json.

**What is a .soul file?** Unified YAML+Markdown or JSON soul spec: name, role, description, attachment_style, baseline_msv. Schema: spec/soul.schema.json. runtime_config (dual_process) stored on bot row.

**Can I self-host?** Yes — Docker Compose with Postgres, optional Ollama. Kernel MIT. Boot sync: `SOULOS_MEMORY_SYNC_WORKSPACE` + `SOULOS_MEMORY_SYNC_BOT_ID`.

**Is there a UI?** Soul Studio (`pip install soulos-studio`, port 8765) for sliders, export, deploy, test chat.

## Monorepo packages

- `packages/soulos-core` — kernel
- `packages/soulos-gateway` — cloud API gateway
- `packages/soulos-sdk/ts` — @soulos/sdk
- `packages/soulos-sdk/python` — soulos-sdk
- `packages/soulos-studio` — Soul Builder UI

## Suggested GitHub topics
